summary: PROMPT 10 (Production deploy prep — EAS Build, IAP stub, Reminder Cron, Deep linking) validated. Backend pytest 13/13 PASS at /app/backend/tests/test_prompt10.py covering: (a) IAP validate stub: requires auth (401 unauth), 400 on platform!='ios|android', 400 on empty receipt_data, returns {valid:false, message:'IAP validation not yet implemented...', platform} for valid ios/android requests. (b) push_log unique compound index on (match_id, user_id, type) confirmed via direct Mongo introspection. (c) services/reminder_service imports cleanly (check_and_send_reminders + reminder_background_loop + DEFAULT_REMINDER_HOURS=24); a live invocation against the active DB returns int>=0 without raising — confirms tz-naive coercion at line 39-40 works and lifespan task is healthy. (d) Regression suites untouched — 50/51 prior tests still PASS (1 expected SKIP) on test_prompt6_room.py + test_prompt7.py + test_prompt9.py. (e) /api/me, /api/groups/my, /api/push/prefs, /api/billing/group/{id}, /api/listings all unchanged. Frontend RN-web on iPhone viewport (390x844): GET /?code=SPORT26 → login-group-code-input value === 'SPORT26' (deep-link prefill working via useLocalSearchParams). GET / (no query) → groupCode input empty as expected. UI renders in Bulgarian + Dark Glass theme correctly (GameOn brand, 'Организирай футболния си мач' subtitle, Име/Телефон/Код на група labels). Asset PNGs verified: icon 1024x1024, splash 1284x2778, adaptive-icon 1024x1024, notification-icon 96x96, favicon 64x64 — all valid PNG signatures. app.json: name=GameOn, slug=gameon, scheme=gameon, bundleIdentifier=com.gameon.app, package=com.gameon.app, plugins=[expo-router, expo-notifications, expo-calendar, expo-location] ✓. eas.json: 3 profiles (development/preview/production) with EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL ✓ and submit config for both platforms ✓. backend/.env.example contains all required keys including SUPER_TEST_LOGIN_ENABLED ✓. /app/.gitignore includes .env*, !.env.example, google-services.json, google-service-account.json ✓. /app/memory/DEPLOY_CHECKLIST.md exists with backend deploy + iOS + Android + post-deploy + future migrations sections ✓. iap.ts and billingApi.validateIapReceipt wired correctly ✓.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/services/reminder_service.py — Tz-naive coercion at line 39-40 is correct (Mongo can return naive datetimes). Dedup is via push_log compound unique index — line 95-100 inserts log even when send_push_batch returns 0 to prevent retry storms. ±5min trigger window (line 68) combined with 5-min cron interval guarantees each user gets exactly one reminder per match. The match_time variable is reassigned to tz-aware on line 40 BUT subsequent reminder_time computation (line 66) uses the local variable — correct.

/app/backend/server.py:145-160 — Both recurrence_task and reminder_task created in lifespan startup; both cancelled with try/await on shutdown swallowing CancelledError — clean. push_log unique index at line 110-112 — ✓.

/app/backend/routes/billing.py:244-255 — IAP validate stub correctly raises 400 for invalid platform/empty receipt BEFORE returning the {valid:false} stub. Pydantic IAPReceiptRequest model enforces required fields (422 on missing). Auth via Depends(get_current_user_impl) ✓.

/app/frontend/app.json — version 1.0.0 / buildNumber 1 / versionCode 1 are starter values; bumping required for re-submission. extra.eas.projectId='REPLACE_WITH_EAS_PROJECT_ID' AND updates.url=https://u.expo.dev/REPLACE_WITH_EAS_PROJECT_ID — both must be replaced before `eas build`. Documented in DEPLOY_CHECKLIST.md.

/app/frontend/eas.json — development profile uses 'http://localhost:8001' which won't reach a phone on a different network — fine for simulator only (development profile has ios.simulator=true). Preview/production env URLs are placeholders pointing to api-staging.gameon.bg and api.gameon.bg — wire DNS before submit.

/app/frontend/src/services/iap.ts — startPurchase opens Stripe URL via window.open on web and Linking.openURL on native. Apple/Google will reject digital-goods bypass on real submission — DEPLOY_CHECKLIST.md correctly flags 'Future migrations: Switch from Stripe-in-WebView to native IAP'.

/app/frontend/app/index.tsx:33-47 — useEffect prefers params.code (already routed via expo-router) and falls back to Linking.getInitialURL() parse for cold-start native deep links. .toUpperCase() normalisation applied — matches backend entry_code uniqueness convention.

/app/.gitignore — Has lots of duplicate `# Environment and credential files` blocks (lines 84-189) appearing 11x — cosmetic noise only, all entries are correctly ignored. Suggest cleanup in a follow-up.
MINOR — /app/memory/DEPLOY_CHECKLIST.md line 11 says webhook URL points to '/api/stripe/webhook' but actual route is '/api/webhook/stripe' (server.py:185). Update path in checklist.
MINOR — Placeholder 1024x1024 icon.png is 9.3KB — likely a flat colour or simple text. Final designs required before store submission per /app/frontend/assets/_README.md (per request).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/conftest.py (added load_dotenv for backend/.env so tests can read MONGO_URL/DB_NAME)

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 prompt10 tests + 50/51 regression, 1 SKIP unchanged from prompt9)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable Prompt 10 deliverables on web (deep-link prefill verified, assets verified, configs verified)

seed_data_creation: None. test_prompt10.py is read-only against existing seed data; no test_push_log entries created since reminder_service runs against live data and seeded matches have no upcoming-in-48h fixtures with matching reminder windows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PROMPT 10 fully validated. Reusable regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_prompt10.py (13 tests). KEY GOTCHAS: (1) /app/backend/tests/conftest.py was extended to load /app/backend/.env so any test that needs MONGO_URL/DB_NAME via os.environ works directly. (2) IAP validate endpoint requires Bearer token — unauth returns 401 (expected). (3) push_log unique compound index name is auto-generated by Mongo (match_id_1_user_id_1_type_1) — verify by .key shape, not name. (4) Deep-link prefill on web uses ?code=XXX query param via useLocalSearchParams from expo-router; native cold-start uses Linking.getInitialURL() with gameon://join?code=XXX. Both upper-cased before setGroupCode. (5) check_and_send_reminders requires global db via deps.set_db() — already invoked by lifespan in production, but tests must do it explicitly (pattern shown in test_reminder_service_runs_without_error). (6) eas.projectId AND updates.url BOTH placeholder strings 'REPLACE_WITH_EAS_PROJECT_ID' — main agent should NOT replace these in the testbed because real builds happen on user's EAS account. (7) DEPLOY_CHECKLIST.md has minor typo: webhook path should be /api/webhook/stripe (not /api/stripe/webhook).
